data.title: Ethereum spot ETF saw a total net outflow of $8.54 million yesterday, ending its 8-day streak of net inflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $8.54 million yesterday (October 9th, EST). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow yesterday was the Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a net inflow of $39.29 million, bringing ETHA's historical net inflow to $14.57 billion. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow yesterday was the Fidelity ETF FETH, with a net outflow of $30.26 million, bringing FETH's historical net inflow to $2.72 billion. As of press time, the Ethereum spot ETF's total net asset value (NAV) was $29.90 billion, with a 5.71% ETF NAV ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization), and a cumulative net inflow of $15.08 billion.

data.title: Coinbase and Mastercard in Advanced Talks to Acquire UK Stablecoin Firm BVNK
data.description:
Coinbase and Mastercard are reportedly in advanced talks to acquire London-based stablecoin firm BVNK.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/coinbase-and-mastercard-in-advanced-talks-to-acquire-bvnk/

data.title: This week’s mining data highlights: Bitcoin mining company IREN announced the completion of the pricing of $875 million convertible senior notes
data.description: Week 42 of 2025 (October 3-9): 1. According to cloverpool, the average computing power of the Bitcoin network was 1012 EH/s, with a maximum of 1117 EH/s and a minimum of 885 EH/s, a decrease of 4.57% from the average computing power of last week (1061 EH/s). 2. According to blockchain.com, the average price of Bitcoin was US$122,630, with a maximum of US$126,296 and a minimum of US$119,328, an increase of 8.98% from the average price of last week (US$112,523). 3. Mining news worth noting include: (1) Bitcoin mining company IREN announced the completion of the pricing of US$875 million convertible senior bonds with a coupon rate of 0.00% and due in 2031; (2) JPMorgan Chase: The total market value of 14 US-listed Bitcoin mining companies reached US$56 billion in September, a record high. Data partner: Cango Inc. (CANG), a Bitcoin mining company listed on the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: Vitalik: The prediction market has made significant progress, and Polymarket is the key driving force
data.description: Vitalik Buterin stated that prediction markets have made significant progress since Augur v1 in 2015, and that Polymarket was a key enabler of this progress. He stated that he was "very happy to see the progress Polymarket has made over the years." Earlier this week, Polymarket received a $2 billion strategic investment from the parent company of the New York Stock Exchange, at a post-money valuation of $9 billion.

data.title: Solana's on-chain TVL reaches $42.4 billion, a record high
data.description: According to Cointelegraph, the total locked value (TVL) of Solana chain applications reached US$42.4 billion, setting a record high.

data.description: On Oct 10, 2025, 04:31 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 1,270 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,271.75 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.97% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETFs Record Ninth Consecutive Day of Net Inflows
data.description: According to PANews, on October 9, Bitcoin spot ETFs experienced a total net inflow of $198 million, marking the ninth consecutive day of net inflows. Among these, BlackRock's ETF IBIT saw a single-day net inflow of $255 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $65.19 billion. Meanwhile, Bitwise ETF BITB recorded a net inflow of $6.58 million, with a historical total net inflow of $2.52 billion. As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs stands at $164.79 billion, accounting for 6.83% of Bitcoin's total market capitalization, with cumulative historical net inflows reaching $62.77 billion.

data.title: A certain address traded "Open Sesame" on the Gate Web3 platform, with a current floating profit of approximately 864%.
data.description: Data shows that a certain address purchased 10.7976 million "SesameOpen" tokens on the Gate Web 3 platform for approximately US$170.79, and the transaction had a floating profit of approximately 864.08%.

data.title: BitMEX announces the launch of the Uptober Carnival event
data.description: BitMEX's Chinese channel announced on the X platform that the BitMEX Uptober Carnival event has launched, with a prize pool of 1 million USDT and $100,000 worth of BMEX. The event runs from October 10th to November 9th.

data.title: A whale holding a large stake in the Chinese meme coin has increased his holdings on Binance Life, becoming the seventh largest individual coin holder.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi (@ai_9684 xtpa), a "whale who heavily invested in Chinese memes at a high point" added to his Binance Life holdings 15 minutes ago at an average price of $0.30, now ranking seventh among individual holders. To date, he has invested a total of $4.08 million in Binance Life, with an average cost of $0.3485. This represents a floating loss of $576,000 per coin and a total account loss of $1.109 million.

data.title: HSK price hit a high of $0.46, with a 24-hour increase of over 23%.
data.description: Market data shows that the price of HSK reached a high of $0.46, a 24-hour increase of over 23%. Earlier news indicated that HaskKey was seeking an IPO.

data.title: ‘Bitcoin Jesus’ Roger Ver Agrees to $48M Deal to Resolve US Tax Fraud Case
data.description:
Roger Ver, known as “Bitcoin Jesus,” has struck a tentative $48m deal with the US Justice Department to settle a tax fraud case, the NYT reported.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-jesus-roger-ver-settles-us-tax-fraud-case/

data.title: BitMart [BM Discovery] Launches Xiuxian (XIUXIAN) Zone
data.description: According to an official announcement from BitMart, the [BM Discovery] section will launch the BSC-based Meme Coin Xiuxian (XIUXIAN) at 11:00 (ET on October 10), and the XIUXIAN/USDT trading pair will be opened.

data.title: Rising Gold Prices Reflect Growing Distrust in Fiscal Policies, Expert Says
data.description:
According to PANews, Ajay Rajadhyaksha, Chairman of Barclays Global Research, has highlighted in a recent report that the increase in gold prices this year signifies a growing distrust in the current fiscal and monetary systems. He pointed out that the debt burdens of four major economies—the United States, the United Kingdom, France, and Japan—exceed 100% of their respective GDPs, with their fiscal conditions continuing to deteriorate. Rajadhyaksha emphasized the lack of political will to implement fiscal reforms.

Meanwhile, traditional safe-haven assets like the Japanese yen and Swiss franc are losing some of their appeal. Rajadhyaksha noted that gold typically rises during times of economic instability or financial market collapse. Despite the current healthy performance of financial markets, he believes the recent surge in gold prices should serve as a warning to policymakers.

data.title: HashKey Considers IPO
data.description: According to Zhitong Finance, HASHKEY, Hong Kong's largest cryptocurrency exchange, is reportedly seeking an IPO to raise no more than US$500 million.
